name: copilot-money-mcp
description: AI-powered personal finance queries using local Copilot Money data. Query transactions, analyze spending, and track accounts with natural language.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Get transactions with optional filters for date ranges, category, merchant, account, amount, pending status, and region/country

tools.name: get_cache_info
tools.description: Get information about the local data cache, including the date range of cached transactions and total count

tools.name: refresh_database
tools.description: Refresh the in-memory cache by reloading data from the local Copilot Money database. Use when the user has recently synced new transactions.

tools.name: get_accounts
tools.description: Get all accounts with balances, optionally filter by account type (checking, savings, credit, investment)

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: Get all categories found in transactions with human-readable names, transaction counts, and total amounts

tools.name: get_recurring_transactions
tools.description: Identify recurring/subscription charges with frequency, monthly cost, confidence score, and next expected charge date. Filter by name or recurring_id for detailed view with transaction history and account info.

tools.name: get_budgets
tools.description: Get budgets from Copilot's native budget tracking.

tools.name: get_goals
tools.description: Get financial goals from Copilot's native goal tracking.

tools.name: get_investment_prices
tools.description: Get investment price history for portfolio tracking. Returns daily and high-frequency price data for stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and crypto.

tools.name: get_investment_splits
tools.description: Get stock split history. Returns split ratios, dates, and multipliers for accurate historical price and share calculations.

tools.name: get_connections
tools.description: Get Plaid connection health for linked financial institutions. Shows connection status, last sync times, error codes, and whether re-authentication is needed.

tools.name: get_balance_history
tools.description: Get daily balance history for accounts. Returns historical balance snapshots showing how account balances changed over time.

tools.name: get_holdings_history
tools.description: Get investment holdings history with daily price and quantity snapshots. Returns monthly documents with daily snapshots showing how positions changed over time.
